targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(created_at, '1h'), model, SUM(cost_usd)::double precision AS value FROM analysis_usage_events WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(created_at, '1h'), phase, SUM(cost_usd)::double precision AS value FROM analysis_usage_events WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(created_at, '1h'), phase || ':' || model AS metric, SUM(total_tokens)::double precision AS value FROM analysis_usage_events WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

WITH usage_cost AS (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0)::double precision AS cost FROM analysis_usage_events WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)), analyzed AS (SELECT COUNT(*)::double precision AS cnt FROM message_extractions WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)) SELECT (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()) * 1000)::bigint AS time, CASE WHEN analyzed.cnt = 0 THEN NULL ELSE usage_cost.cost / (analyzed.cnt / 1000.0) END AS value FROM usage_cost CROSS JOIN analyzed

WITH snap AS (SELECT analysis_cost_usd_1h::double precision AS v FROM stage5_metrics_snapshots ORDER BY captured_at DESC LIMIT 1), usage AS (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0)::double precision AS v FROM analysis_usage_events WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour') SELECT (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()) * 1000)::bigint AS time, (usage.v - COALESCE(snap.v, 0)) AS value FROM usage LEFT JOIN snap ON TRUE

SELECT model, phase, ROUND(SUM(cost_usd)::numeric, 6) AS cost_usd, SUM(total_tokens) AS total_tokens, COUNT(*) AS requests FROM analysis_usage_events WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY model, phase ORDER BY SUM(cost_usd) DESC LIMIT 20
